prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `9caba7c3`.
codex_response:
Implemented a new ARC2 task package for `9caba7c3`. The rule is: find every maximal `3x3` window made only of `2` and `5` with a `5` center, then in the output turn that center into `4` and recolor the remaining `5`s in the window to `7` while preserving the original `2`s. I discarded the summary hint because its “almost-full `2x2`” description misses official cases with single reds, diagonal pairs, and larger sparse subsets; that correction is documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9caba7c3/notes.md#L1).

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9caba7c3/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9caba7c3/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9caba7c3/generator.py#L41). No new DSL primitive was needed; the task-local window scan was sufficient. The generator matches the family by fixing the official `19x19` noisy `0/5` background, placing four latent `3x3` red/gray motifs, and then forcing away shifted false positives so only the intended maximal windows survive.

Verification passed end-to-end: `4/4` official examples, `1000/1000` generated examples, build artifacts produced, and I visually checked a generated preview sheet. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9caba7c3/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9caba7c3/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9caba7c3/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9caba7c3/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9caba7c3/previews/preview_03.png). The worktree already had unrelated modifications and untracked files; I left those untouched.
